title: Retro Camera Sticker
summary: Single die-cut sticker of a mint-and-cream vintage TLR camera, 1970s graphic vibe.
prompt: A single die-cut sticker design of a vintage twin-lens reflex camera (TLR style) in soft mint-green and cream, rendered in flat vector illustration with a thick white sticker border and subtle drop shadow. Tiny stars and dotted-line motion arcs around it suggesting a click-and-snap. Cheerful retro 1970s graphic-design vibe. White background, centered, square 1:1 composition.
